description: Recto: Letter fragment in the hand of Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi. Mentions antimony (rāṣakht) and asks for news, including any news of the wife of his paternal uncle ʿImrān (see Moss. IV,27.2, T-S 8J24.17, ENA NS 68.11, and possibly  T-S 8J10.16). Verso: Letter in Arabic script addressed to Abū ʿImrān (presumably the same paternal uncle mentioned on recto). Possibly also from Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi, but more specimens of his Arabic handwriting need to be collected. The sender informs Abū ʿImrān of the various goods that he has shipped. (Information in part from CUDL.) ASE
description_he: רקטו: קטע מכתב בכתב ידו של משה בן לוי הלוי. מוזכרת אנטימון (ראצאח'ת), ושאלות על שלום אשת דודו עמראן. ורסו: מכתב בכתב ערבי מופנה לאבו עמראן, מדווח על סחורות שנשלחו.
